missingInfo: The representation documents drop cables from closures to buildings, but does not provide explicit source→target documentation for inter-closure trunk connections. The cable paths visible in LAYER 2 show the geometric routes but the CABLES section only lists drop cables (closure→building). To complete the path from CL-A to CO-1, the topology of how closures connect to each other and ultimately to the CO would need to be documented.

The CABLES section defines only drop cables (closure-to-building connections). No trunk cables connecting closures to each other or to the source CO-1 are provided. Therefore, the complete path from B-0 through intermediate equipment back to CO-1 cannot be determined from the given representation.

The representation does not explicitly define the backbone network topology—which closures connect to which other closures in sequence toward CO-1. The LEGEND shows only which closure serves which building (serves= field), not inter-closure connectivity. Therefore, only CL-A (which directly serves B-0) can be confirmed as on the path. The complete chain from B-0 through intermediate closures to CO-1 cannot be determined from the provided data.
